name: multi-agent-copilot
description: Graph-based multi-agent system inside the Copilot chat panel

chatParticipants.name: team
chatParticipants.description: A graph-based multi-agent team: planner, coder, researcher, reviewer, UI designer, and test generator — orchestrated by a supervisor with inter-agent communication.

commands.name: plan
commands.description: Break down a task into a step-by-step plan

commands.name: research
commands.description: Research a topic, API, or library

commands.name: review
commands.description: Review code for correctness and quality

commands.name: design
commands.description: Design UI components, layouts, and interfaces (Gemini 3 Pro)

commands.name: test
commands.description: Generate unit tests and test suites
